summary: Iteration 211 - Botany Module & Archives Auth Timing Fix Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Botany page loads correctly with plant catalog, element filters, AI identify panel, and garden functionality. Archives page auth timing fix verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/botany/catalog - Returns 12 plants with gravity_mass, frequency, element, nature, locked/unlocked based on mastery tier - PASS
GET /api/botany/plant/{plant_id} - Returns full plant detail with TCM properties - PASS
POST /api/botany/garden/add - Adds plant to garden, returns 400 for duplicate, 404 for invalid - PASS
GET /api/botany/garden - Returns garden with energetics summary (dominant element, nature, frequency) - PASS
POST /api/botany/garden/nurture - Daily nurture with growth stages, returns 400 for already nurtured - PASS
DELETE /api/botany/garden/{garden_id} - Removes from garden, returns 404 for invalid - PASS
POST /api/botany/identify - AI plant identification with TCM profile using Gemini - PASS
GET /api/botany/element-map - Five Elements with generating/controlling cycles - PASS
GET /api/botany/gravity-nodes - Plant catalog as gravity nodes for Spatial OS - PASS
Archives.js auth timing fix (lines 37-46) - Checks loading && token before API calls - PASS
Botany.js auth timing - Uses authLoading && token pattern correctly - PASS
seed_data_creation: Added mugwort and white_peony to garden during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 211 added the new Botany module with TCM Five Elements integration. All 9 botany endpoints work correctly. The plant catalog has 12 plants with gravity_mass (60-100), frequency (Solfeggio frequencies based on element), element (Wood/Fire/Earth/Metal/Water), nature (Hot/Warm/Neutral/Cool/Cold), and rarity-based tier locking. Garden supports max 24 plants with daily nurture mechanic and growth stages (Seed→Sprout→Sapling→Mature→Ancient→Transcendent). AI identify uses Gemini LLM. Element map includes generating cycle (Wood→Fire→Earth→Metal→Water→Wood) and controlling cycle. Archives auth timing fix verified - page waits for loading+token before fetching data.

botany_catalog.details: Returns 12 plants with TCM properties, tier-based locking (observer tier = common unlocked)

botany_plant_detail.details: Returns full plant data including tcm_actions, traditional_use, spiritual, energetic_profile

botany_garden_add.details: Adds plant to garden, validates duplicates (400), invalid plants (404), max 24 limit

botany_garden_get.details: Returns garden with summary (dominant_element, dominant_nature, garden_frequency)

botany_garden_nurture.details: Daily nurture action, returns 400 if already nurtured today, tracks growth stages

botany_garden_delete.details: Removes plant from garden, returns 404 for invalid entry

botany_identify.details: AI plant identification using Gemini, returns TCM profile with element, nature, frequency

botany_element_map.details: Five Elements with generating/controlling cycles, plants grouped by element

botany_gravity_nodes.details: Returns 12 botanical nodes for Spatial OS integration

archives_auth_timing.details: Auth timing fix verified - checks loading && token before API calls (lines 37-46)

frontend_botany_page.details: Page loads with plant cards, element filters, AI identify panel, garden panel, view toggle
